unsupported_device.title: Unsupported EcoFlow device ({prefix})
unsupported_device.description: An EcoFlow device with serial prefix `{prefix}` is bound to your account but is not supported yet by this integration, so no entities were created for it. Only the prefix is shown for privacy. Please open an issue on the project's GitHub repository including this prefix so support can be added.

user.title: EcoFlow IoT
user.description: Enter the Access Key and Secret Key from the EcoFlow developer portal (developer.ecoflow.com → Security).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate EcoFlow IoT
reauth_confirm.description: Your EcoFlow API credentials are no longer valid. Enter updated keys.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid Access Key or Secret Key.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the EcoFlow API.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to poll the HTTP API (fallback when MQTT is unavailable, and the cadence for refreshing HTTP-only values).
data_description.mqtt_stale_seconds: If no MQTT message arrives within this window, the integration polls HTTP.
